I always wake up at six.
She usually commutes by car.

So, tell me about a normal weekday. What do you usually do?
Well, I always wake up early, around six thirty. Then I get ready and I have breakfast.
Nice. And how do you get to work?
I usually commute by car. At work, I check emails and I often have meetings.
Sounds busy! Do you do anything to relax in the evening?
Yes. I sometimes work out, and I never go to bed late. I really need my sleep.
That is a healthy routine. You sound very organized.
Thank you! I am, and a clear routine keeps me calm.
I always wake up early and get ready.
I usually commute by car and start work at eight.
I often have meetings and check emails.
On weekends, I never set an alarm.
I relax in the evening and go to bed early.

Hi, let me tell you about my typical Monday. I always wake up at six. I get ready quickly, and I have breakfast with my wife. I usually commute by car, and I start work at eight. In the morning, I check emails and I have two or three meetings. I often have lunch at my desk, which is not a great habit. In the evening, I sometimes work out, but honestly, I rarely go to the gym on Mondays. I cook dinner, I relax for an hour, and I never go to bed after eleven. That is a normal Monday for me.

My weekends are very different from my weekdays. On weekdays, I always wake up early and I rush. But on weekends, I never set an alarm. I usually wake up slowly, and I make a big breakfast. I often go for a walk in the morning. In the afternoon, I sometimes meet a friend for coffee, or I just stay home and read. I rarely work on the weekend, because I really need to rest. In the evening, I cook something special and I relax. I feel calm and happy. That is how I recharge for the week.
First, I wake up and I get ready. Second, I have breakfast. Third, I commute and I start work. Fourth, I check emails and I have meetings. Fifth, I finish work, I cook, and I relax.
